## Summary

Describe the user-visible result and why the change is needed.

## Verification

List the checks you ran and their results.

## Checklist

- [ ] `stylua --check .` passes.
- [ ] `./tests/run.sh` passes.
- [ ] Tests cover general behavior or semantic palette contracts rather than exact built-in theme colors.
- [ ] Public options, integrations, or behavior changes are documented.
- [ ] The change contains no unrelated cleanup or formatting.
